<!-- A clear and concise description of what you want to happen -->

# Example of how the feature would work

## Implementation Complexity

<!-- Your assessment of the implementation difficulty -->

- [ ] Simple (hours to implement)
- [ ] Moderate (days to implement)
- [ ] Complex (weeks to implement)
- [ ] Major (months or significant redesign)

## Related Features

<!-- Are there related features or issues? Link them here -->

## Breaking Changes

<!-- Would this feature introduce breaking changes? -->

- [ ] Yes, this would break existing code
- [ ] No, this is backwards compatible
- [ ] Unsure

## Checklist

- [ ] I have searched existing issues to ensure this is not a duplicate
- [ ] I have clearly described the problem and solution
- [ ] I have provided example code showing the usage
- [ ] I have considered backwards compatibility
